title: Why 1,100 Scotland World Cup fans are taking school buses to Foxborough
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: World Cup Priced out of Boston, Tartan Army supporters organized buses from Rhode Island — cutting travel costs in half.
Gregor Cowan (center, yellow sunglasses), is an organizer with the Tartan Army, which is sending 1,100 Scotland soccer fans to Gillette Stadium on yellow school buses for the 2026 World Cup.
(Photo courtesy of Gregor Cowan) By Annie Jonas May 6, 2026 | 11:18 AM 3 minutes to read ShareSend this article to your social connections.
